overrides.comment: Metadata is owned by app/layout.tsx per the privacy/indexing policy; app/page.tsx is a client component and cannot export metadata.

Unmount cleanups read timeout/audio refs assigned by callbacks after mount. The canonical 'copy ref.current to a local' fix captures null at mount, leaking timers and risking setState-after-unmount. False positive.
Intentional localStorage-hydration SSR-flash guard. Deriving state from defaultTheme on hydration is the deliberate pattern; restructuring reintroduces the flash.
Swapping div role= for <main>/<output> changes the rendered DOM element, violating the zero-design-change constraint.
Moving scrollIntoView out of the effect changes scroll timing (visible behavior change).
